en: And I lifted my eyes and saw, and behold, a man with a measuring line in his hand!
zh: 我又舉目觀看，看見一人手裡拿著量度用的繩子。

en: Then I said, "Where are you going?" And he said to me, "To measure Jerusalem, to see what is its width and what is its length."
zh: 我問他：“你到哪裡去？”他對我說：“我要去量度耶路撒冷，看看有多寬，有多長。”

en: And behold, the angel who talked with me came forward, and another angel came forward to meet him
zh: 那與我說話的天使離去的時候，另有一位天使迎著他來，

en: and said to him, "Run, say to that young man, 'Jerusalem shall be inhabited as villages without walls, because of the multitude of people and livestock in it.
zh: 對他說：“你快跑去告訴那年輕人：‘耶路撒冷必有人居住，像沒有城牆規限的田野，因為城中的人和牲畜很多。

en: And I will be to her a wall of fire all around, declares the LORD, and I will be the glory in her midst.'"
zh: 耶和華說：我要作耶路撒冷四圍的火牆和城中的榮耀。’”

en: Up! Up! Flee from the land of the north, declares the LORD. For I have spread you abroad as the four winds of the heavens, declares the LORD.
zh: “嗨！嗨！你們要從北方之地逃走 ，因為我過去曾把你們分散在天的四方。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Up! Escape to Zion, you who dwell with the daughter of Babylon.
zh: 耶和華說：“嗨！與巴比倫的居民同住的錫安的人民哪！逃跑吧！”

en: For thus said the LORD of hosts, after his glory sent me to the nations who plundered you, for he who touches you touches the apple of his eye:
zh: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說，得了榮耀之後，他差遣我去攻擊那些劫掠你們的列國，因為凡觸摸你們的，就是觸摸他眼中的瞳人。

en: "Behold, I will shake my hand over them, and they shall become plunder for those who served them. Then you will know that the LORD of hosts has sent me.
zh: 看哪！我要向他們揮動我的手，他們就必成了自己奴僕的掠物。這樣，你們就知道萬軍之耶和華差遣了我。

en: Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion, for behold, I come and I will dwell in your midst, declares the LORD.
zh: “錫安的居民 哪！你們要歡呼快樂，因為我要來住在你們中間。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: And many nations shall join themselves to the LORD in that day, and shall be my people. And I will dwell in your midst, and you shall know that the LORD of hosts has sent me to you.
zh: 到那日，許多國家要歸附耶和華，作他的 子民，他要 住在你們中間。你們就知道萬軍之耶和華差遣了我到你們那裡去。

en: And the LORD will inherit Judah as his portion in the holy land, and will again choose Jerusalem."
zh: 耶和華必再得著猶大作他在聖地的業分，他必再揀選耶路撒冷。

en: Be silent, all flesh, before the LORD, for he has roused himself from his holy dwelling.
zh: 全人類都當在耶和華面前肅靜，因為他從自己聖潔的居所被激動起來了。
